zh.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarke於1609年出生在英國多瑟特。他於大約1636年與Sarah Strong在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼多爾斯特結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1643年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利且於1659年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓。他去世於1690年7月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年81歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarke于1609年出生在英国多瑟特。他于大约1636年与Sarah Strong在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼多爾斯特结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1643年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼普萊姆斯度波利且于1659年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼諾薩普頓。他去世于1690年7月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓享年81岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈普爾諾薩普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Clarke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Clark  .

History: This name was brought independently to New England by many bearers from the 17th century onward. Nicholas Clarke was one of the founders of Hartford, CT (coming from Cambridge, MA with Thomas Hooker) in 1635.

variants.name: Clark
meanings: English: from Middle English clerk, clark ‘clerk, cleric, writer’ (Old French clerc; see Clerc ). The original sense was ‘man in a religious order, cleric, clergyman’. As all writing and secretarial work in medieval Christian Europe was normally done by members of the clergy, the term clerk came to mean ‘scholar, secretary, recorder, or penman’ as well as ‘cleric’. As a surname, it was particularly common for one who had taken only minor holy orders. In medieval Christian Europe, clergy in minor orders were permitted to marry and so found families; thus the surname could become established.
Irish (Westmeath, Mayo): in Ireland the English surname was frequently adopted, partly by translation for Ó Cléirigh; see Cleary .
Americanized form of Dutch   De Klerk   or Flemish   De Clerck   or of variants of these names, and possibly also of French   Clerc  . Compare   Clerk   2 and   De Clark  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarke was born in 1609, in Dorset, England. He married Sarah Strong about 1636, in Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1643 and Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America in 1659. He died on 18 July 1690, in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 81, and was buried in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarke est né en 1609, à Dorset, Angleterre. Il a épousé Sarah Strong environ 1636, à Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1643 et à Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1659. Il est décédé le 18 juillet 1690, à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 81 ans, et a été enterré à Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarke wurde 1609 in Dorset, England geboren. Er hat um 1636 in Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Sarah Strong geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1643 hat er in Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und 1659 in Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Er starb am 18. Juli 1690 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarke è nato il nel 1609 nel Dorset, England. Lui sposato Sarah Strong circa 1636, nel Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1643 e nel Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America nel 1659. Morì il 18 luglio 1690, nel Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 81 anni, e fu sepolto a Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarkeは1609年にイギリスドールセトで生まれた。約1636年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニードールチェスターでSarah Strongと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1643年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニープリモウスダクスブリーに，1659年にはイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーノーサンプトンに住んでいた。彼は1690年7月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンで81歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーハンプシュアイアノーサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarke(은)는 1609년 영국 도르세트에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1636년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 도르체스터에서 Sarah Strong(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1643년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 플림우스 드스버이에서, 1659년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 노르섬프턴에서 살았다. 그는 1690년 7월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에서 81세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 함프실르 노르섬프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarke nasceu em 1609, em Dorset, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Sarah Strong aproximadamente 1636, em Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1643 e em Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America em 1659. Ele faleceu em 18 de julho de 1690, em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 81 anos, e foi sepultado em Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarke родился в 1609 г. в местности дорсет, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Strong около 1636 г. в местности дорчестир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности дуксбури, плимоут, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1643 году и в местности нортамптон, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1659 году. Он умер 18 июля 1690 г. в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 81 год и был похоронен в местности нортамптон, хампшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Lieutenant William Clarke nació en 1609, en Dorset, Inglaterra. Se casó con Sarah Strong aproximadamente 1636, en Dorchester, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1643 y en Northampton, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America en 1659. Murió el 18 de julio de 1690, en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 81 años, y fue sepultado en Northampton, Hampshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
